response.global_analysis: The video features a live concert performance. The first part is an original song 'Like! Like! Like!' by FuwaMoco and Mori Calliope, requiring transcription from audio and on-screen text. The second part, 'Je t'aime ★ Je t'aime', matches the provided reference lyrics. Timing is strictly aligned to the audio waveform, separating the high-energy rap sections from the melodic verses and the spoken interlude. English translations are contextually adapted to match the idols' personae and the song's themes.

subtitles.original: 好きで好きでしょうがない
subtitles.english: I love it, I love it, I can't help it!

subtitles.original: 次は何にしようかな
subtitles.english: What should we do next?

subtitles.original: 歩く わるい 止まる わるい 飛ばす言葉 Like! Like! Like!
subtitles.english: Walk, bad; stop, bad; I'll let the words fly, Like! Like! Like!

subtitles.original: 360度 パノラマ全方向 大好きの陣
subtitles.english: 360-degree panorama, in all directions—it's the love camp!

subtitles.original: 何が一つでもいいから のめり込める自分のアイテム
subtitles.english: If there's even one thing you can lose yourself in, it's your own item

subtitles.original: Like a superstar, fly 'em man 無敵キャンディ 他大体来世
subtitles.english: Like a superstar, fly 'em man; invincible candy, the rest for the next life

subtitles.original: 望んでる彼もきっと 現世が愛おしくなるはずなのさ
subtitles.english: Surely even the guy who's wishing will find this world precious

subtitles.original: なろうとしてなるもんじゃない 人生楽しんでいこうじゃない
subtitles.english: It's not something you force yourself into; let's just enjoy life!

subtitles.original: 自分に素直であれ
subtitles.english: Be true to yourself

subtitles.original: Spotlight 僕らを照らせ
subtitles.english: Spotlight, shine on us

subtitles.original: 今日も愛を叫ぶだけだ Get down!
subtitles.english: Today, I'll just scream my love! Get down!

subtitles.original: Sing along a song for you!
subtitles.english: Sing along a song for you!

subtitles.original: I Like It! I Like It! 手を伸ばせば
subtitles.english: I Like It! I Like It! If I reach out my hand

subtitles.original: きっと全てがミラクルで
subtitles.english: Surely everything will be a miracle

subtitles.original: Happy! Happy! 日常でさえ
subtitles.english: Happy! Happy! Even in daily life

subtitles.original: 夢の物語さ
subtitles.english: It's a dream story

subtitles.english: I Like It! I Like It! I met you

subtitles.original: ずっと離さないでいてね
subtitles.english: Don't ever let go

subtitles.original: ガシャガシャ どこどこ ヤーヤーヤー パワー！

subtitles.original: 好き好き好きで勝負大 糧に得たいこの感情

subtitles.original: 歯止めと最先端 真剣勝負
